name: Juicebox
description: Provides an integration between the Juicebox HTML5 responsive gallery library and Drupal.
stability_note: The installed release is 4.0.0-alpha2 — an ALPHA. The plugin ids, config schema, and formatter/style settings documented here are stable across the 4.0.x branch, but treat the branch as pre-release and pin explicitly if you depend on it.

library_dependencies.juicebox_js: External JavaScript library (Juicebox Lite/Pro) from https://juicebox.net/download/ — NOT a Composer dependency. Download it and place juicebox.js under /libraries/juicebox/. Config-level formatter/style setup works without it, but a rendered gallery needs the JS present.

notes: Ships test-only modules under tests/modules/ (juicebox_mimic_article, juicebox_test_views, juicebox_test_media, juicebox_test_layout_builder). juicebox_mimic_article is a demo/example and is intentionally NOT documented here. Also installs four image styles: juicebox_small, juicebox_medium, juicebox_large, juicebox_square_thumb.
